issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated'. Card says 'When Attacking' which is an attack trigger.

Action sequence is reversed. Card says: (1) add 1 Life card to hand, (2) then add 1 deck card to Life cards. DSL has SearchDeck (to hand) second, but should be first. Also SearchDeck should target Life cards, not hand.
SearchDeck destination is 'hand' but should be 'life' - card adds deck card to Life cards, not hand.
Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' not 'HasRestingDon' - the cost is DON!! x2 attached to the card, not resting on leader.
